template_object.text:
Instruction: You are a CTI expert that gives precise and concise answers.

Question: What is the most effective mitigation for the technique {ap:attack-pattern.name} (id {ap.id}) to reduce organizational risk?

Answer: To mitigate {ap.name}, organizations should implement course of action {coa:ap.mitigates<.name} (id{coa.id}). Description of mitigation: {coa.description[_~"organizational risk"]}.

query: MATCH (ap:`attack-pattern`), (ap:`attack-pattern`)<-[:mitigates]-(coa:`course-of-action`), (coa:`course-of-action`)     WHERE (toLower(coa.description) CONTAINS toLower("organizational risk"))     LIMIT 2000     RETURN DISTINCT ap.name, ap.mitre_id, coa.name, coa.mitre_id, coa.description     ORDER BY rand()
